name: Breast of Chicken on Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together 1/2 cup of the soup and milk mixture in a bowl.
3. In another bowl, combine the remaining soup mixture with half of the onion soup mix and the rice.
4. Pour this mixture into an oblong baking dish.
5. Place the chicken breasts on top of the mixture.
6. Pour the reserved soup and milk mixture over the chicken.
7. Cover the dish and bake for 1 hour.
8. Uncover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
